programme.title: Captain N The Game Master
programme.desc: Mother Brain makes a discovery that Kevin isnt very good at the Bayou Billy video game So she sets a trap to lure him into Bayouland

programme.title: The Herculoids
programme.desc: The Herculoids

programme.title: Billy the Kid Returns
programme.desc: Rogers plays a lookalike to the dead Billy The Kid and restores the tranquility of Lincoln County after subduing the criminal element

programme.title: Arizona Days
programme.desc: Arizona Days

programme.title: Daniel Boone Trailblazer
programme.desc: Daniel Boone leads settlers into Kentucky but must battle Shawnee Indians who have been persuaded by a French renegade that Boone and the settlers are there to kill them and steal their land

programme.title: Filler
programme.desc: Filler

programme.title: Innerspace
programme.desc: A test pilot is miniaturized in a secret experiment and accidentally injected into a hapless store clerk

programme.title: The Incredible Hulk Returns
programme.desc: Hopefully on the verge of curing his Hulk condition Banner meets his colleague Don Blake who is mystically linked to a Viking warrior Thor

programme.title: The Fastest Gun Alive
programme.desc: In the western frontier town of Cross Creek storekeeper George Temple is a polite and soft spoken man with a secret past When 3 bank robbers on the lam stop in town to change horses Georges past comes back to haunt him

programme.title: Springtime in the Rockies
programme.desc: Broadway partners Vicky Lane and Dan Christy have a tiff over Christys womanizing Jealous Vicky takes up with her old flame and former dance partner Victor Price and Dans career takes a nosedive In hopes of rekindling their romance and getting Vicky back on the boards with him Dan follows her to a ritzy resort in the Canadian Rockies where she and Victor are about to open their new act But things get complicated when Dan wakes after a bender to find that hes hired an outlandish Latin secretary Rosita Murphy which makes Vicky think hes just up to his old tricks again

programme.desc: Count Gruemon steals Kevins Power Pad and Zapper in Hyrule Kevin and Link head out to the world of Puss n Boots to retrieve the stolen items

programme.desc: Quimby suspects that MAD are planning to steal a precious formula that could end world famine

programme.title: Tales from the Crypt
programme.desc: An insurance salesman murders an obnoxious tycoon to get his seductive wife and his fortune but later is blackmailed by a rival

programme.title: Tales from the Crypt

programme.desc: A fast food owner has only one goal in life - to utterly destroy and humiliate his competition However he gets a taste of his own medicine

programme.title: The HItchhiker
programme.desc: A fashion designer demands too much from his model which leads to her suicide This gets all those hed wronged to seek revenge

programme.title: Werewolf
programme.desc: Eric tracks the werewolf Janos Skorzeny to Hollywood where Skorzeny has been killing prostitutes But Eric is mistaken for the killer

programme.title: Werewolf
programme.desc: On Halloween Eric sees the pentagram appear on his hand and knows his transformation into a werewolf is imminent He locks himself in an abandoned house not realizing that a disfigured recluse still lives there

programme.title: Friday the 13th The Series
programme.desc: Micki Ryan and Jack travel to a small town where the disappearance of several children is linked to a mysterious toy playhouse

programme.title: Dark Night of the Scarecrow
programme.desc: In a small Southern town four vigilantes wrongfully execute a mentally-challenged man but after the court sets them free mysterious accidents begin to kill them off one by one

programme.title: Freddys Nightmares
programme.desc: A high school track star haunted by the recent death of her Olympic-medalist mother is given her mothers magic crystal amulet which brings to life her secret ambitions and extracts vengeance upon those who cause her pain

programme.title: Real McCoys
programme.desc: Theres a new game warden in town and his name is George MacMichael

programme.title: Real McCoys
programme.desc: Grampa and Luke give Kate a break from her family chores including the cooking

programme.title: Get Smart
programme.desc: At an island paradise hotel 86 and Harry Hoo solve a murder mystery

programme.title: Get Smart
programme.desc: Max and 99 end up on a KAOS sub commanded by Siegfried

programme.title: BJ and the Bear
programme.desc: The college students who hire BJ to haul equipment for a talent show secretly plan to his rig as a gambling casino

programme.title: Mister Ed
programme.desc: Roger invests in Lady Linda a lovesick racehorse that wont run so its Mister Ed the love doctor to the rescue

programme.title: Mister Ed
programme.desc: George Burns is offering 25000 for a great new novelty act so Wilbur begs Mister Ed to talk to Mr Burns

programme.title: Gomer Pyle USMC
programme.desc: Gomer and his fellow Marines are headed into town on day passes when one of them is stuck on guard duty Gomer volunteers to help his buddys wife take care of things for the baby - but Sgt Carter volunteers to drive them around leaving his date on hold

programme.title: Gomer Pyle USMC
programme.desc: While hitching a ride to town Gomer stops to help a stranded motorist she takes him into town to meet her mother A robber is holding up liquor stores while wearing a Marines uniform at the same time

programme.title: Gilligans Island
programme.desc: Gilligan rescues a native woman from drowning which according her custom makes her his slave But soon a fellow tribesman comes to the island and challenges Gilligan for her in a fight to the death

programme.title: Gilligans Island
programme.desc: A missing military jet pack washes up on the island and The Professor tries to figure out a way to use it for their rescue

programme.title: Inspector Gadget

programme.title: Earth Final Conflict
programme.desc: A joint Doors InternationalTaelon venture creates a machine that allows people to vividly relive a memory but Liam suspects a back alley version of the device is leading to the death of some users

programme.title: War of the Worlds
programme.desc: The team is sent to Grovers Mill when it is discovered the 1938 radio broadcast of invasion was real They meet with a group of local men who successfully fought the Martians 50 years ago and believe the Martians have returned to try and retrieve weapons abandoned in 1938

programme.title: Swamp Thing
programme.desc: Swamp Thing encounters Falco who has come to kill Dr Arcane for turning him from a bird into a man

programme.title: Swamp Thing
programme.desc: When an attempt on Dr Alec Hollands life leaves him consumed by deadly chemicals and fire the swamps of Louisiana transform him into a superhuman creature hell-bent on ridding the swamp--and the world--of the evil that men do

programme.title: Space 1999
programme.desc: The Alphans find themselves caught up in a long-running war between two rival planets Betha and Delta When a Bethan gunship which has landed on the moon as a tactical advantage appears to have been hit its commander Dione seeks sanctuary with the Alphans Koenig attempts to negotiate a truce but Dione has other ideas

programme.title: The Wizard of Speed and Time
programme.desc: A Hollywood filmmaker Mike Jittlov makes a short for an evil film studio Unbeknownest to him the producer has placed a bet of 25000 that he wont come up with anything with a use Luckily our film creator gets the help of his friends

programme.title: The Dukes of Hazzard
programme.desc: Bo and Luke learn that their artist friend Grannie Annie is the mastermind behind a small-time counterfeiting ring After her arrest Boss seizes the engraving plates to sell to no-nonsense counterfeiter Big John Downey Bo and Luke work to clear Annies name unaware that their efforts may have deadly consequences for Boss

programme.title: Lonesome Dove Outlaw Years
programme.desc: Lonesome Dove Outlaw Years

programme.title: The Streets of San Francisco
programme.desc: A religious man is killing clergy Lt Stone and Inspector Keller race to find a connection between the clergymen to each other and to the killer When they figure out who the next victim is Mike Stone puts on the collar

programme.title: Mission Impossible
programme.desc: Rogosh is an operative for a country hostile to the United States When he strikes he typically leaves dozens if not hundreds of bodies in his wake Rogosh has been spotted in Los Angeles But he will not crack under normal interrogation methods Briggs comes up with an unusual plan The IMF stages an accident where pedestrian Rogosh is struck by a car When he awakes he appears to be in a prison in his home country -- three years later

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: fter work Joe Friday goes by a laundromat to buy cigarettes He interrupts a burglar stealing from the coin box and shots are fired The burglar dies and Friday is investigated by the shooting board to see if it is a justified shot

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: A man is forcing different young women to help him rob banks and Friday and Gannon have to find out who he is and stop him

programme.title: The Fugitive
programme.desc: When Kimble reads of his fathers death he wants to go back home to meet his sister Gerard is expecting this and the DA who convicted Kimble hopes his capture will make him Governor But Kimble has an unexpected ally helping him

programme.title: Big Valley
programme.desc: Pardoned after a long imprisonment for a crime he didnt commit a man has Jarrods help in adjusting to being free again The man is hired to work at the ranch and after having doubt planted by one of the hands his fear of returning to prison may lead to the death of the man who was the Prosecuting Attorney in the his case- Jarrod

programme.title: Cheyenne
programme.desc: In Mexico Cheyenne finds a wounded man he takes to a local village which has a female doctor He quickly learns the town is being held hostage by a vicious bandit who will burn the village if he doesnt find who shot two of his men

programme.title: Missing in Action 2
programme.desc: Prequel to the first Missing In Action set in the early 1980s it shows the capture of Colonel Braddock during the Vietnam war in the 1970s and his captivity with other American POWs in a brutal prison camp and his plans to escape

programme.desc: Braddock mounts a one-man assault to free his wife and son who are still being held in a Vietnam prison camp

programme.desc: A martial artist must defeat a plan by ninjas to create a worldwide training camp for terrorists

programme.desc: The festive fun of the annual Mardi Gras celebration is brought to a halt when a swarm of African killer bees escape from a foreign freighter

programme.desc: Arizona cop is sent to Switzerland to bring in the girlfriend of a dangerous mobster so she can testify against him The mobster sends someone too - assassins

programme.desc: A high school track star haunted by the recent death of her Olympic-medalist mother is given her mothers magic crystal amulet which brings to life her secret ambitions and extracts vengeance upon those who cause her pain

programme.title: Freddys Return A Nightmare Reborn
programme.desc: As a child Kevin was kidnapped by Freddy Krueger before Freddy was killed by a mob of angry parents Although he was rescued by the detective that arrested Krueger he was left scarred emotionally and psychologically 13 years have passed and Kevins family has moved back to Elm Street stirring up Kevins darkest memories A weakened desperate Freddy trapped in the dream world by his mother a nun named Sister Mary Helena following the events of Nightmare 5 has caught Kevins scent the one that got away

programme.title: The Horror at 37000 Feet
programme.desc: An invisible demon in the cargo hold of a jet airliner terrorizes the passengers

programme.title: Fright Night 2
programme.desc: Fright Night Part 2 is a sequel to link=tt0089175] Charley Brewster and the horror host Peter Vincent must face more vampires out for revenge

programme.title: Night of the Zombies
programme.desc: Investigators search for soldiers missing bodies and hear unbelievable rumors about zombies Dismissing those rumors they set out to investigate After two men are found dead CIA special-agent Nick Monroe is sent to flush out what are suspected to be deserters from the old US Army Chemical Corps unit Nicks ruthless investigation uncovers a ghoulish plot of world domination but first he must escape the horror that does not want to be known yet!

programme.title: City of the Living Dead
programme.desc: A psychic and a journalist head to Dunvich to prevent an apocalypse after a priest commits suicide in a cemetery somehow causing the gates of hell to open and allowing the dead to rise

programme.title: House II The Second Story
programme.desc: A man Arye Gross and his friend Jonathan Stark exhume an ancestor Royal Dano in the house where his parents were killed

programme.desc: The Premier MMA promotion, Telecast live across the globe Showcasing some of the worlds best MMA athletes.

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: After retiring from his wrestling career Sean Quinn still wanted to compete. He viewed his discovery of Brazilian Jiu Jitsu as a natural progression to MMA. As Sean takes us through his day, we see life from the perspective of somebody who doesn't like to rely on others. Inspired by his own childhood in which he did not have access to a gym and coaching, he has turned that around, becoming a coach and owning his own gym.

programme.title: Bleav in Giants
programme.desc: The broadcast team of commentator Bob Papa and New York Giants legend Carl Banks bring you weekly analysis on your New York Giants.

programme.title: Bleav in Chargers
programme.desc: The greatest fullback in Chargers history Lorenzo Neal hops on the mic with Chargers Play-By-Play Broadcaster Matt "Money" Smith to talk all things Jim Harbaugh, Justin Herbert, and the Los Angeles Chargers.

programme.title: Bleav in Texans
programme.desc: Bleav in Texans is your go-to podcast for everything Houston Texans, hosted by former NFL wide receiver Cecil Shorts III and former defensive tackle and sports radio host Seth Payne.

programme.title: Bleav in Buckeyes
programme.desc: Former Ohio State Football Players Chimdi Chekwa and Bryant Browning talk all things Buckeyes. THE #1 Ohio State Football Podcast out there talking Ryan Day, CJ Stroud, and the rest of the Grey and Scarlet.

programme.title: Bleav in Panthers
programme.desc: Panthers great, Running Back Jonathan Stewart, is joined by Tobacco Road Sports Radio's Desmond Johnson, and Schuyler Callihan for weekly analysis on the Carolina Panthers!

programme.title: Bleav in Lions
programme.desc: Former Lions All-Pro Glover Quin and 7-time Emmy winner Trevor Thompson break down all the latest buzz around Dan Campbell, Jared Goff, Jahmyr Gibbs, and the Detroit Lions on the Bleav in Lions podcast.

programme.title: Bleav In Bills
programme.desc: Adam Benigni and Sal Maiorana are two of the most experienced reporters in western New York with more than 70 years of experience covering the Buffalo Bills.

programme.title: The Ruffino & Joe Show
programme.desc: Blake Ruffino and Joe DeLeone join forces to talk about the latest in the SEC and College Football

programme.title: Bleav in Bengals
programme.desc: Solomon Wilcots hits the mics to talk Bengals football. After covering the field for the 'Who Dey?' nation

programme.title: Bleav In Commanders
programme.desc: Welcome to the Bleav in Commanders show hosted by former Washington WR Anthony Armstrong and Scott Jackson .We are proud to be a part of the Bleav Podcast Network! We provide insight on the Washington Commanders to the best fan base in the NFL! All content is for the fans, and by the fans. LET’S GO WASHINGTON!

programme.title: Simms Complete
programme.desc: Football is the Simms family business. Join former NFL QB Matt Simms & Super Bowl MVP Phil Simms as they share unique insight on the game they love.

programme.title: See Ball Get Ball
programme.desc: Hosted by David Pollack, a College Football Hall of Famer, three-time First-Team All-American from the University of Georgia, and first-round NFL Draft pick, this podcast provides honest analysis of the most significant stories, matchups, and moments in the world of college football.

programme.title: Bleav in Giants
programme.desc: The broadcast team of commentator Bob Papa and New York Giants legend Carl Banks bring you weekly analysis on your New York Giants.

programme.title: Bleav in Chargers
programme.desc: The greatest fullback in Chargers history Lorenzo Neal hops on the mic with Chargers Play-By-Play Broadcaster Matt "Money" Smith to talk all things Jim Harbaugh, Justin Herbert, and the Los Angeles Chargers.

programme.title: Bleav in Texans
programme.desc: Bleav in Texans is your go-to podcast for everything Houston Texans, hosted by former NFL wide receiver Cecil Shorts III and former defensive tackle and sports radio host Seth Payne.

programme.title: Bleav in Buckeyes
programme.desc: Former Ohio State Football Players Chimdi Chekwa and Bryant Browning talk all things Buckeyes. THE #1 Ohio State Football Podcast out there talking Ryan Day, CJ Stroud, and the rest of the Grey and Scarlet.

programme.title: THE SENIOR CARE 10-25-25
programme.desc: In a world accelerating at lightning speed—where AI reshapes industries generations collide and burnout reaches new highs—leadership can no longer rely on old rules A Superconscious Leader hosted by Dr Ail Dal is the wake-up call leaders need to navigate this era of disruption with clarity courage and higher awareness Each episode reveals how to move beyond fear-based leadership and tap into conscious purpose-driven influence that transforms pressure into possibility Joined by global experts like Dr Deepak Butra Dr Dal explores emotional intelligence service-centered leadership mindset mastery and the deeper inner work required to thrive in the age of AI This is not about being superhuman—it’s about becoming super conscious Your rise starts here

programme.title: Jayce and The Wheeled Warriors
programme.desc: Jayce hears a rumour planted by Saw Boss that Audric is aboard the Edro Life ship a ship that is capable of carrying entire civilisations to new galaxies Jayce is able to get aboard the ship by steering the Pride through the thrusters energy flow

programme.title: Jayce and The Wheeled Warriors
programme.desc: The Lightning League lands on a desert planet with no plant life assuming that is where Audric would be They are mistakenly led by a mirage of Audric to try and rescue him but they are attacked by the native nomads who have been tricked

programme.title: MASK
programme.desc: A millionaire has hired VENOM to steal a machine that can cause ultra sonic vibrations The millionaire wants to become vice president of the Netherlands and if his demands are not met he will destroy all of Hollands dykes He only wanted to bluff -- too bad Mayhem never bluffs

programme.title: MASK
programme.desc: VENOM steals the famous Lippizaner Stallions earning 4 million in platinum bars from an Arab At the end VENOM loses the money by a laser shot from Shark and they all quickly flee in Piranha

programme.desc: The Price For Glory

programme.title: Captain N The Game Master
programme.desc: Simon gets shot by a love-at-first-sight arrow and falls in love with Mother Brain

programme.title: Captain N The Game Master
programme.desc: After the Computer Mind Mirror of Mother Brain says that Princess Lana is the most beautiful of them all the Eggplant Wizard makes a poison apple that will make Princess Lana fall asleep

programme.title: Dungeons Dragons
programme.desc: Hank and Bobby are captured by orcs The others with the help from their new friends - Cloud Bears - are trying to rescue Hank and Bobby but to their horror discover that Hank has turned against them Or has he

programme.title: Dungeons Dragons
programme.desc: Dungeon Master gives all his powers to Eric to teach him a lesson

programme.title: Inspector Gadget
programme.desc: Gadget Penny and Brain try to derail MADs plan to steal an entire train carrying sophisticated computers that will help their operation

programme.title: Inspector Gadget
programme.desc: Quimby sends Gadget to infiltrate MADs laboratory that is producing a sleeping gas so powerful that it will send everyone in the world to fall asleep

programme.title: Challenge of the GoBots
programme.desc: The GoBots are forced into a grudging alliance to defeat a race of enormous metal-eating spiders

programme.title: Challenge of the GoBots
programme.desc: Warlike insects invade the Earth thanks to Cy-Kills space rift but his plan backfires when the bugs prove too difficult to eradicate even for the Renegades
